description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a modern, open layout and a flat roof. The structure features multiple rooms, including bedrooms, living areas, and bathrooms, all arranged around a central entryway. Large windows and sliding glass doors are distributed asymmetrically along the exterior walls, allowing for ample natural light. The front entrance is accentuated by a paved walkway, flanked by small landscaped areas with trees and shrubs. There is a visible garage space and a backyard area with a pool, as well as several outdoor patios and terraces. The exterior is finished in light-colored plaster or concrete, with wooden accents and minimalistic landscaping.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of indoor and outdoor living spaces, including a garage and pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, landscaped walkway, and a clear view of the central living spaces.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, pool area, and several large windows and patio doors.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, pool, and multiple outdoor terraces with access to interior rooms.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional bedrooms, garage, and more windows, with visible landscaping elements.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
